title: Spectrum Public Server Pack
description: Modpack for the Spectrum Community's public server
body:
This modpack is a Kitchen sink-style modpack. As the name implies - the focus of the pack is around Spectrum. It includes a lot of mods that integrates well with Spectrum, like Create, Botania, Mythic Metals, and many more!

The pack is made for the Spectrum Community's public server, and is a work in progress. Mods, configs, and recipes are subject to change. Despite this you can still play the modpack fine in single-player. 

If you would like to join the public server, then you can [click here to join the official Spectrum Discord server](https://discord.gg/733BZ5xNym).
